zh.lifeSummary: Helen Calder是William Caldor的女兒，於大約1215年出生在蘇格蘭乃爾史爾卡多爾。她和Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh至少有5個兒子。她去世在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Helen Calder是William Caldor的女儿，于大约1215年出生在苏格兰乃爾史爾卡多爾。她和Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh至少有5个儿子。她去世在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Calder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of the places called Calder in Midlothian and Caithness, or Cawdor in Nairnshire.

English: perhaps a habitational name from Calder in Cumbria, named from the river on which it stands (probably a British name, from Welsh caled ‘hard, violent’ + dwfr ‘water, stream’). However, the modern surname in England seems to be of Scottish origin, rather than from the Cumbrian placename.

variants.name: Caulder
meanings: English (Surrey): variant of Scottish   Calder  . This typically Scottish spelling of the name is now found mainly in southeastern England.

variants.name: Calderwood
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Calderwood in Lanarkshire, named from the Cumbrian river name Calder (see Calder ) + Middle English wode ‘wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: Helen Calder was born about 1215, in Cawdor, Nairnshire, Scotland as the daughter of William Caldor. She had at least 5 sons with Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh. She died in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Helen Calder est née environ 1215, à Cawdor, Nairnshire, Écosse, fille de William Caldor. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils avec Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh. Elle est décédée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Helen Calder wurde um 1215 in Cawdor, Nairnshire, Scotland, als Tochter von William Caldor geboren. Sie hatte mit Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Helen Calder è nata il circa 1215 nel Cawdor, Nairnshire, Scotland come figlia di William Caldor. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli con Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh. Morì nel Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Calderは約1215年にスコットランドナイルンシュアイアカウドルでWilliam Caldorの娘として生まれた。彼女はShaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintoshとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼女はスコットランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Calder(은)는 대략 1215년 스컷랜드 나른실르 카w도르에서 William Caldor의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 스컷랜드에서 사망했다.

mn.Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdo: Siorrachd Inbhir Nis, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Helen Calder nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Cawdor, Nairnshire, Scotland filha de William Caldor. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh. Ela faleceu em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Helen Calder родилась около 1215 г. в местности кавдор, неирншир, Шотландия. Её отца звали William Caldor. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh. Она умерла в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Helen Calder nació aproximadamente 1215, en Cawdor, Nairnshire, Scotland como hija de William Caldor. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh. Murió en Scotland.
